title: McFlank
description: Small mod collection with performance and qol mods.
body:
Basically Vanilla minecraft with performance and qol mods.
Overworld and Nether are fully vanilla compatible.
The end generation is changed. 
Can be run on server, while allowing vanilla clients to join.
Can be run on client only, while allowing to join vanilla servers. Be aware that some mods may be considered cheating by some server owners.
Works best installed on server and client.
